title: JJK – Central 47 Database Terminal
description: Jujutsu Sorcery Commission classified network terminal. Opens from the Journal sidebar — available to all players and the GM for in-session roleplay access.
description-changes: v1.3.0 — Reception engine: likes & dislikes now react to what a post actually says (topic heat, effort, praise vs slander, ragebait, and condoning-vile takes) — great takes on hot subjects can reach ~5000, weak/obscure ones get tens, and posts now earn real downvotes. Replies read the same signals (agreement, defenders, troll wars, outrage dogpiles) and recall repeat posters. Role/job flair replaces personality tags, plus realistic unfiltered language and three new recurring posters.
